headline: Up 183% Over the Past Year, Does Teradyne Stock Have More Room to Run?
summary: Teradyne (TER) has surged 183% over the past year. TER stock recently hit a new all-time high of $344.92. The stock boasts an 80% “Buy” Barchart opinion and robust technical momentum. Despite bullish sentiment from many analysts and investors, some advisory services warn TER may be overvalued relative to fundamentals....
